# vastai_audit_logs (Data Source)

Retrieves audit log entries for the authenticated Vast.ai user. Returns API call history including IP addresses, API routes, and timestamps.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List recent account activity from audit logs
data "vastai_audit_logs" "recent" {}

output "log_count" {
  value = length(data.vastai_audit_logs.recent.audit_logs)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `audit_logs` (Attributes List) List of audit log entries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--audit_logs))

<a id="nestedatt--audit_logs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `audit_logs`

Read-Only:

- `api_key_id` (String) ID of the API key used for the call.
- `api_route` (String) API route that was called.
- `args` (String) Arguments passed to the API call.
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the audit log entry was created.
- `ip_address` (String) IP address from which the API call was made.
